page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-180-lssd is a memory-optimized and storage-intensive server instance powered by the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 180 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 90 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The hardware configuration includes 1440.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio with 8.0 GB per core. Local storage is bundled, consisting of 16 NVMe SSDs totaling 6432 GB of local capacity.

Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier capabilities across multiple dimensions. The instance achieves top 10% performance in multi-core CPU execution, Passmark CPU tests, and memory bandwidth, with uncached read speeds reaching 346.89 GB/sec and write speeds at 176.26 GB/sec. Database operations and Redis SET operations also place in the top 10%, reflecting high efficiency for transactional and in-memory workloads. Single-core performance is strong, ranking in the top 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench tests.

For advanced workloads, the CPU supports instruction sets including AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, AVX512_BF16, and VAES. These hardware extensions contribute to top-tier performance in LLM inference prompt processing and text generation across medium and large models. Qualitative cost efficiency is high for large-scale enterprise deployments, as the dense consolidation of 1440 GB of RAM and 6.4 TB of local NVMe SSDs reduces the need for multi-node clustering.

This server is designed for memory-intensive, low-latency workloads. Primary use cases include large-scale in-memory databases, high-throughput transactional databases, software compilation, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-180-lssd is a memory-optimized and storage-intensive server instance configured with 180 dedicated vCPUs on an AMD EPYC 9B14 x86_64 processor. It features 1440.0 GB of RAM and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 16 drives. Benchmarks place this instance in the top 10% for multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations, with uncached read speeds of 346.89 GB/sec. The processor supports AVX-512 and VAES, driving top-tier results in LLM inference and cryptography tests. This server is optimized for large-scale in-memory databases, high-throughput transactional systems, and intensive data processing workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory and storage server featuring 180 vCPUs, 1.4 TB RAM, and 6.4 TB local NVMe SSD capacity.
bullet_points: 180 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processors.
1440 GB of RAM delivering top-tier memory bandwidth.
6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 16 drives.
Top 10% performance in database operations and multi-core benchmarks.
Optimized for in-memory databases, ETL, and CPU-based LLM inference.
